## Task

- DV-####

## Summary

Describe the focused implementation and why it is needed.

## Validation

- [ ] Unit tests
- [ ] Integration or package-boundary tests
- [ ] Cross-platform impact considered
- [ ] No synthetic or real secret appears in logs or artifacts

## Contract and compatibility impact

- [ ] Documentation updated when public behavior changes
- [ ] JSON schemas or protocol versions updated when applicable
- [ ] Adapter compatibility notes included when applicable
- [ ] Changeset added, or the absence of one is explained

## Security considerations

Describe environment, process, file-output, Discord API, or credential changes.
